name: David Clayton-Thomas
abstract: David Clayton-Thomas (born David Henry Thomsett, 13 September 1941 – 24 June 2026) was a British-Canadian musician, singer and songwriter, best known as the lead vocalist of the American band Blood, Sweat & Tears. Clayton-Thomas began his music career in the early 1960s, working the clubs on Toronto's Yonge Street, where he discovered hi…

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Brecker
about_quotes.evidence: in Blood, Sweat & Tears I also learned a lot from... And they were going to add a lead singer named David Clayton Thomas. They begged me to stay... I announced that I was going to join Horace Silver.
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Brecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 12, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Don Alias
about_quotes.evidence: He had come back. When I came back in the band he had come back.
about_quotes.doc_title: Don Alias interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 6, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: John Abercrombie
about_quotes.evidence: The singer was, he was a pretty good singer but he wasn’t powerful like David Clayton Thomas or one of those guys
about_quotes.doc_title: John Abercrombie interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Lipsius
about_quotes.evidence: David Clayton Thomas to me was the best pop singer, he had the strongest voice. He could sing any kind of music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Lipsius interviewed by Monk Rowe. Boston, Massachusetts, July 25, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: BS&T with their Canadian singer, David Clayton Thomas, and I was at all four shows just taking mental notes
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Reggie Watkins
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Was that with David Clayton Thomas? ... [INTERVIEWEE] No. He was not
about_quotes.doc_title: Reggie Watkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018
